reason: PR2 changes ToolContext and tool execution path to worktree_path. The boundary check is currently project_root; step 4 must keep the same semantic (path inside project) but the physical root moves. This spec defines assert_within_root contract.
PR1 adds a new column `worktree_path TEXT NULL` to `sessions` table; this spec defines the ALTER pattern + migration story (pre-step-4 rows have NULL, which must fallback gracefully).
All 3 PRs must pass cargo check / cargo test (sse.rs / error.rs have #[cfg(test)]). Spec defines the quality bar for backend PRs.
Worktree create/destroy can fail (path collision, branch exists, libgit2 errors). Spec defines LlmError-style error classification for new git::Error. UI shows clean error messages.
Worktree lifecycle emits tracing events (worktree created, destroyed, diff requested). Spec defines tracing conventions.
PR1 adds new module `app/src-tauri/src/git/` (or similar). Spec defines the new-module pattern. libgit2 wrappers go there.
PR3 adds <DiffView> component + ChatPanel header 'diff' button + edit_file card 'diff' button. Spec defines Vue 3 <script setup> patterns, prop typing, scoped CSS.
PR3 needs to add a new store or extend chat store to fetch diff from Tauri. Spec defines Pinia store patterns.
PR3 types the DiffView payload (file list + per-file unified text). Spec defines the type patterns for IPC payloads.
PR3 must pass vue-tsc --noEmit. Spec defines the frontend quality bar.
PR3 adds new component file. Spec defines where new components go (probably components/chat/DiffView.vue).

Critical: confirms git2-rs (vendored libgit2) covers worktree add/list/lock/unlock/prune + commit/diff/status 100%, only `worktree remove` needs spawn fallback. Implements the 1+5 file module structure.
Recommends jsdiff (kpdecker) + self-rendered Vue component (~150 lines). Confirms Monaco overkill for 1-50 files × 1-500 lines. Defines the DiffView API: <DiffView :mode='unified' :files='...'>.
Authoritative requirements. implement agent should re-read this before each PR to ensure no drift.
Step 4 crosses 3 layers (DB schema, Rust libgit2, Vue UI). This guide covers cross-layer design checks (e.g. ipc contract must match frontend expectations).
PR2 has 7 tools to migrate. Spec guides on finding shared patterns rather than copy-pasting ctx.cwd → ctx.worktree_path in 7 places.
